remarks: Welcome home to this warm and inviting 3-bedroom, 3-bath residence in Stamford's desirable Ridgeway neighborhood. Nestled on a level .21-acre lot, this cozy 1,598 sq ft home offers comfortable living with excellent investment potential in a highly sought-after area. The main level features a spacious master bedroom for convenient single-floor living, a bright eat-in kitchen, and a sun-filled family room with laundry facilities and a full bath - creating a practical and relaxed space perfect for everyday family life. The living room flows naturally, making it an ideal spot for gatherings and creating lasting memories. Upstairs, two generously sized bedrooms share one full bathroom, offering flexibility for growing families, guests, or future expansion. Additional highlights include a one-car attached garage and a flat, easy-to-maintain yard ready for outdoor enjoyment. Ideally located near schools, shopping, dining, parks, and major commuting routes, this charming home delivers strong long-term value, solid rental appeal, and great equity-building potential. Whether you're growing family, or savvy investor, 37 Old Barn Road South provides comfort, convenience, and a smart investment opportunity in a prime Stamford location. A cozy gem ready for its next chapter - don't wait, schedule your showing today!
